name: folder-scope
title: Folder Scope
description: Search text instantly inside files in your active Finder folder.
author: omer_aydemir

commands.name: search-content
commands.title: Search Content
commands.description: Search text inside files in the active Finder folder.

preferences.name: defaultDirectory
preferences.title: Default Search Directory
preferences.description: Used when no Finder directory can be detected.

preferences.name: noFinderBehavior
preferences.title: When No Finder Directory Is Available
preferences.description: What to do when Finder has no usable selection or window.

data.title: Ask Me to Pick a Directory

preferences.name: preferredEngine
preferences.title: Search Engine
preferences.description: Automatic tries bundled ripgrep, then system ripgrep, then the built-in Node.js engine.

preferences.name: defaultCaseMode
preferences.title: Default Case Sensitivity
preferences.description: Smart case is case-insensitive unless the query contains an uppercase letter.

preferences.name: defaultSearchMode
preferences.title: Default Search Mode
preferences.description: Plain text treats the query literally; regular expression uses ripgrep-style syntax.

preferences.name: defaultMaxDepth
preferences.title: Default Search Depth
preferences.description: Maximum directory depth. Leave empty for unlimited; 1 searches only the current directory.

preferences.name: maxFileSizeMb
preferences.title: Maximum File Size (MB)
preferences.description: Files larger than this are skipped.

preferences.name: searchHiddenFiles
preferences.title: Hidden Files
preferences.label: Search hidden files and directories
preferences.description: Include dotfiles and hidden directories in the search.

preferences.name: respectIgnoreFiles
preferences.title: Ignore Files
preferences.label: Respect .gitignore and other ignore files
preferences.description: Skip files matched by .gitignore, .ignore, and similar files.

preferences.name: excludedDirectories
preferences.title: Excluded Directories
preferences.description: Comma-separated directory names that are never searched.
preferences.default: .git, node_modules, bin, obj, .next, dist, build, Library, .cache, .turbo, DerivedData

preferences.name: includedExtensions
preferences.title: Default File Extensions
preferences.description: Comma-separated extensions to search (for example: ts, tsx, md). Leave empty for all files.

preferences.name: debounceMs
preferences.title: Search Debounce (ms)
preferences.description: Delay after typing before the search starts (50–1000 ms).

preferences.name: preferredEditor
preferences.title: Preferred Code Editor
preferences.description: Used by the “Open in Editor” action to jump to the matching line.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
